mapper.sql: id, entity_type, entity_id, institution_id, relation_type, is_primary, extra_data, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO entity_institution (entity_type, entity_id, institution_id, relation_type, is_primary, extra_data, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{institutionId}, #{relationType}, #{isPrimary}, #{extraData}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})

INSERT INTO entity_institution
entity_type, entity_id, institution_id, relation_type, is_primary, extra_data, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at,
#{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{institutionId}, #{relationType}, #{isPrimary}, #{extraData}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.update: UPDATE entity_institution SET entity_type = #{entityType}, entity_id = #{entityId}, institution_id = #{institutionId}, relation_type = #{relationType}, is_primary = #{isPrimary}, extra_data = #{extraData}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM entity_institution WHERE entity_type = #{entityType} AND entity_id = #{entityId} ORDER BY is_primary DESC, created_at ASC
SELECT FROM entity_institution WHERE institution_id = #{institutionId} ORDER BY entity_type, created_at DESC
SELECT FROM entity_institution WHERE institution_id = #{institutionId} AND entity_type = #{entityType} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM entity_institution WHERE entity_type = #{entityType} AND entity_id = #{entityId} AND is_primary = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM entity_institution WHERE entity_type = #{entityType} AND entity_id = #{entityId} AND institution_id = #{institutionId} LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM entity_institution WHERE entity_type = #{entityType} AND entity_id = #{entityId}
DELETE FROM entity_institution WHERE entity_type = #{entityType} AND entity_id = #{entityId} AND institution_id = #{institutionId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO entity_institution (entity_type, entity_id, institution_id, relation_type, is_primary, extra_data, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.entityType}, #{item.entityId}, #{item.institutionId}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.isPrimary}, #{item.extraData}, #{item.startDate}, #{item.endDate}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt})
